logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", //flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, //transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", sourceSystem: "Coupa", targetSystem: "P21" }]

raise-error.description: Validation Failed. Missing PO Number or EDI X Ref Id in request
Validation Failed. Company Id and EDI XRef Id combination is not Available in P21 System.
Validation Failed. PO Number in Coupa Request is already Available in P21 System.

logger.doc:name: No Item Ids
logger.message: No Item Ids Present in Coupa EDI Request

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Valid PO Number
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", "message": "PO Number validation successful, Moving forward to create the Purchase Order in p21", }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : CoupaPurrchaseOrderCreated
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.transmissionId default "", "message": "Coupa Purchase Order Creation Successful. Order Number is " ++ (payload.Order.OrderNo default "NA") }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::Strings --- { "source": vars.integration.source, "target": vars.integration.target, "env": capitalize(p('mule.env')), "integration-type": vars.integration."integration-type"
}

%dw 2.0 output application/json fun safe(v, d="N/A") = if (v == null or (v is String and trim(v) == "")) d else v
var senderKey = vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.senderId default " " as String var msgVendorId = if(senderKey != null) (p('partner.inbound.' ++ senderKey) default p('partner.outbound.' ++ senderKey) default null) else null
var env = p('mule.env') default null var apiName = p('api.name') default null var intType = vars.integration."integration-type" default vars.initialVariables."integration-type" default null var companyNo = vars.purchaseOrderData.value.company_no[0] default null var poNumber = safe(vars.initialPayload[0].b2bMessage.header.poNumber default "" as String, safe(vars.initialPayload.Order.PoNo default "" as String,"N/A") )
fun present(v) = v != null and (v as String) != ""
var segments = [ if (present(env)) upper(env) else null, "FCG ERROR ALERT", if (present(intType)) intType else null, if (present(poNumber)) ("PO(s) " ++ poNumber) as String else null ] filter present($) --- segments joinBy " | "

%dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::Strings --- { "source": vars.integration.source, "target": vars.integration.target, "env": capitalize(p('mule.env')), "integration-type": vars.integration."integration-type"
}

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Item Id Empty Email Not Required
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flow: Mule::p('api.name') default "unknown", application: Mule::p('api.name') default "unknown", environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId default correlationId default "", transmissionId: vars.initialPayload.Order.TransmissionId default "", "message": "No Need to Send Item Id Empty Email for Order Number is " ++ (vars.initialPayload.Order.OrderNo default "NA") }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: Mule::p('api.name') default "unknown", application: Mule::p('api.name') default "unknown", environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.integration.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.initialPayload.Order.TransmissionId default "", //payloadSizeBytes: sizeOf(write(payload, "application/json")), sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "P21" }]
